reasoning: The control CCCS SC-5 focuses on denial-of-service protection, which can be addressed in Kubernetes through network policies that restrict ingress and egress traffic, ensuring that only necessary traffic is allowed. Additionally, configuring resource limits on pods helps prevent resource exhaustion attacks. API server rate limiting can also be implemented to protect against excessive requests that could lead to denial-of-service conditions.
title: CCCS SC-5: Denial-of-service Protection
